calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-032d PCC-analog metastability scalar -- substrate validation (deterministic arithmetic + agent integration)
items.notes: [Renamed from V3-EXQ-447 2026-04-23 per silent-re-queue guard; script was updated, prior run ID re-used inadvertently] Substrate validation for SD-032d PCC-analog (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-19). SD-032d is non-trainable arithmetic, so primary validation is deterministic API + arithmetic checks. C1 baseline_neutral: stability within 0.01 of baseline=0.5 with all-neutral inputs. C2 fatigue_monotone: stability strictly decreasing across drive_level 0.0/0.5/1.0 (falsification-signature direct test). C3 offline_recency_monotone: stability decreasing as steps_since_offline grows 0/250/500/1000 (saturates at window). C4 offline_reset_hook: note_offline_entry resets counter + restores stability. C5 success_ema_convergence: ema > 0.95 after 200 outcomes at alpha=0.02. C6 threshold_modulation: SalienceCoordinator effective_threshold strictly increasing in pcc_stability across 0.1/0.5/0.9 (MECH-259 wiring confirmed). C7 agent_integration: REEAgent select_action populates _pcc_last_tick AND injects pcc_stability into coordinator before tick. C8 backward_compat: use_pcc_analog=False -> agent.pcc is None and convenience hooks no-op. PASS = all 8 checks. Behavioural falsification of rest-driven mode-switch-rate signature requires combined SD-032a+SD-032c+SD-032d 4-arm 2x2 follow-up once cluster fully landed. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: Q-034 hazard/resource threshold retest (supersedes V3-EXQ-288 criteria_null)
items.notes: [Renamed from V3-EXQ-451 2026-04-23 per silent-re-queue guard; script was updated, prior run ID re-used inadvertently] Retest of V3-EXQ-288 (criteria_null). Tightened design with direct goal_reach/harm_exposure/entropy per grid point. 5x3 grid: hazard_density in {0.05,0.10,0.15,0.20,0.25} x resource_density in {0.04,0.08,0.12} = 15 points x 2 seeds = 30 runs, 30 warmup + 30 eval eps each at 200 steps. Uses SD-018 resource_proximity_head and SD-012 drive_weight=2.0 (post-288 substrate). Acceptance: C1 goal_reach monotonically decreasing in hazard_density within >=2/3 resource-density columns; C2 at least one grid point where goal_reach crosses 0.5; C3 all 15 points complete with non-null metrics (the criteria_null fix); C4 avoidance signature at high-hazard/low-resource (diagnostic). PASS = C1 AND C2 AND C3. experiment_purpose=evidence. supersedes V3-EXQ-288.

items.title: SD-032b dACC full pipeline -- E3 harm_eval + terrain trained, terrain fix: min-residue candidate
items.notes: [Renamed from V3-EXQ-445a 2026-04-23 per silent-re-queue guard; script was updated, prior run ID re-used inadvertently] Full-pipeline fix for EXQ-445 monostrategy collapse (root cause: E3 never trained; untrained E3 always selects same action -> entropy=0). Fix: P0 trains E1, E3 harm_eval, terrain_prior (min-residue candidate, not E3-selected), and world-forward. P1 trains E2_harm_a on frozen encoder. P2 eval with pure policy. Also fixes terrain_prior inversion (from ARC-007 diagnosis): terrain trained on minimum-residue candidate from candidate set, not E3's selected trajectory. 3 seeds x 2 conditions (OFF vs ON_INDEPENDENT) x 280 eps x 120 steps. PASS: C1 harm_a_forward_r2>=0.3 in >=2/3 seeds; C2 |entropy_ON - entropy_OFF|>=0.1 in >=2/3 seeds; C3 ON entropy >= OFF entropy in >=2/3 seeds. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: MECH-269 V_s validation entropy probe -- cascade gate
items.notes: Gate for V_s-gated cascade (EXQ-445d / EXQ-449c / EXQ-455a). Baseline agent + V_s flags ON vs OFF. Measure action_class_entropy. PASS = ON entropy > OFF entropy by >=0.1 in >=2/2 seeds. FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE = MECH-284 Phase 3 consumer must land before downstream cascade can be run. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: SD-032b dACC full pipeline -- V_s-enabled re-run with OFF-entropy precondition
items.notes: Gated on MECH-269 V_s validation (V3-EXQ-476); do not run until that passes. Clone of EXQ-445a with use_per_stream_vs/use_per_region_vs/use_event_segmenter/use_invalidation_trigger/use_anchor_sets=True plus an OFF-entropy precondition check: if OFF-arm action_class_entropy stays 0 in >=2/3 seeds, manifest records INCONCLUSIVE (V_s did not break monostrategy lock) rather than FAIL. Otherwise standard SD-032b acceptance: C1 harm_a_forward_r2>=0.3 in >=2/3 seeds; C2 |entropy_ON - entropy_OFF|>=0.1 in >=2/3 seeds; C3 ON entropy >= OFF entropy in >=2/3 seeds. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: MECH-074b BLA retrieval bias on action selection -- V_s-gated
items.notes: Gated on V3-EXQ-445d PASS. Measures whether BLAAnalog retrieval-bias ON vs OFF increases action_class_entropy by >=0.1 and reduces harm_rate in >=2/3 seeds. BLA retrieval_bias is the content-selective per-trace weighting (LaBar & Cabeza 2006); needs upstream V_s cascade to have broken monostrategy before bias effects are observable. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: SD-032a salience coordinator behavioural -- V_s-enabled re-run
items.notes: Gated on V3-EXQ-476 PASS. Clone of EXQ-455 with V_s invalidation runtime flags ON (use_per_stream_vs, use_per_region_vs, use_event_segmenter, use_invalidation_trigger, use_anchor_sets). PASS: C1 action_class_entropy >= 0.5 in COORD_ON arm in >=2/3 seeds; C2 COORD_ON entropy > COORD_OFF entropy in >=2/3 seeds. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: SD-029 balanced hazard-event curriculum -- substrate validation (fix, supersedes V3-EXQ-470)
items.notes: Supersedes V3-EXQ-470 (BASELINE/SCHEDULED bit-identical across all 4 seeds because hazard_harm=0.3 killed episodes before step 25, so the curriculum injection condition never fired -- diagnosed via n_steps_total 15-34 in 470 results vs interval=25). Fix: lower hazard_harm 0.3->0.05 so episodes survive; add per-injection log (ep, step, cumulative) to the manifest; add BASELINE-vs-SCHEDULED n_steps divergence criterion (C_differ) to confirm the curriculum code path actually changes dynamics. Criteria: C_back BASELINE ext_events==0 in all 4 seeds; C_fire SCHEDULED ext_events>=3 per seed; C_differ >=1 seed with n_steps_total divergence; C_info info keys present on every step. PASS = all four. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Substrate validation only (no downstream claim evidence).

items.title: SD-029 event-conditioned MECH-256 comparator -- curriculum ON + scripted agent-caused elicitation (supersedes V3-EXQ-433b)
items.notes: Supersedes V3-EXQ-433b (agent_caused_hazard r2=0.0 across all 4 seeds). Diagnosis: r2=0 is not a MECH-256 architectural failure -- trials_collected['agent_caused_hazard'] was 0 in every seed (eval relied on organic agent-caused events; agent never chose to step onto a hazard), so _safe_r2_from_pairs returned 0 on an empty list. Fix: (1) enable SD-029 curriculum in P0, P1, and eval (scheduled_external_hazard_enabled=True, interval=25, prob=1.0, adjacent_only=False); (2) scripted agent-caused elicitation in eval -- when agent_caused trials short of target AND a hazard is adjacent, script a deterministic move onto it (_find_adjacent_hazard_action); (3) C0 sufficiency gate -- both agent_caused_trials and env_caused_trials must be >=20 in >=3/4 seeds. If C0 fails, outcome=FAIL but per-claim evidence_direction='inconclusive_insufficient_events' (not 'weakens') so governance scores are not corrupted by a trials-shortage run. mean_r2 only averages event types with n>=5 trials. Acceptance: C0 sufficient trials >=3/4 seeds; C1 mean_r2 >= 0.5; C2 attenuation_ratio >=0.5 (agent-caused residual < env-caused); SNR (mean_r2 - r2_none_baseline) positive. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: SD-016 cue_action_proj consumer fix verification -- z_world residual concat (supersedes V3-EXQ-449a)
items.notes: Verification of the SD-016 cue_action_proj consumer fix. EXQ-449a localised the collapse to a uniform-attention bottleneck inside extract_cue_context: ContextMemory slots init at randn*0.01 so key_proj's bias dominates, all keys look identical, softmax = uniform (entropy=ln(num_slots)=2.7726), bmm(uniform, v) = mean(v) is constant across batch -> cue_context constant -> cue_action_proj output had per-channel std ~2.7e-8 in g2. Fix (predictors/e1_deep.py): cue_action_proj input changed from cue_context (latent_dim=64) to [cue_context, z_world] (concat, latent_dim+world_dim=64+32=96). Guarantees non-collapsed input path even when attention degenerates. cue_terrain_proj left unchanged (terrain_loss already trains it; not the bottleneck). Same three-regime protocol as 449a (g1 supervised-active, g2 frozen, g3 detach-bypassed). Acceptance pivots from 'find the offender' to 'verify the offender is gone': PRIMARY P1 g2 action_bias_per_channel_std > 1e-3 (was 2.7e-8); SECONDARY S1 g2 action_bias_norm_mean > 1e-3, S2 supervised target sanity >=80% coverage, S3 (bonus) g2 action_bias_div > 0.05. PASS = P1 AND S1 AND S2. Smoke-test 2026-04-23 dry-run (P0=2 P1=3 eval=4 ep): g2 per-channel std 2.957e-3, primary_pass=True. experiment_purpose=diagnostic (excluded from governance scoring). Unblocks EXQ-418b downstream.

items.title: SD-016+SD-017 context-conditioned action with cue_action_proj consumer fix (supersedes V3-EXQ-418a)
items.notes: [Renamed from V3-EXQ-418b 2026-04-23 per silent-re-queue guard; script was updated, prior run ID re-used inadvertently] Re-run of EXQ-418a now that the SD-016 cue_action_proj consumer fix has landed (predictors/e1_deep.py: cue_action_proj consumes [cue_context, z_world] instead of cue_context alone -- breaks the uniform-attention collapse identified by EXQ-449a and verified gone by EXQ-449b). EXQ-418/418a previously FAILed three times with action_bias_divergence=0.0; the consumer collapse is now removed at the substrate. This re-run uses the SAME script as 418a (no script changes required -- the fix is upstream in e1_deep.py and is enabled when sd016_enabled=True, which 418a already sets). Expectation: action_bias now carries per-input variation (verified in 449b smoke at per-channel std 2.957e-3) so the SD-017 context-conditioned-action gate has a non-collapsed input to act on. PASS criteria inherited from 418a. If this still FAILs, the blocker is downstream of cue_action_proj (in hippocampal proposal scoring or E2 action_object consumption), not in the SD-016 substrate itself.
